description: Analysis specification for food and beverage distributors and manufacturers in the UK

categories.label: Food and/or Beverage Distributor
categories.description: Company primarily distributes food/beverage products from suppliers to end customers

categories.label: Food and/or Beverage Distributor and Manufacturer
categories.description: Company both manufactures AND distributes food/beverage products

categories.label: Not Food or Beverage Related
categories.description: Company is not involved in food or beverage distribution or manufacturing

questions.question: Determine their primary business model in the food industry. Look at their homepage, services, and about sections to understand if they move physical food products from suppliers to end customers (restaurants, retailers, institutions). Check for keywords like 'distribute', 'wholesale', 'delivery', 'supply chain', 'foodservice', 'broadline', 'fleet', 'next-day delivery', 'route delivery'. Identify whether they primarily manufacture products themselves or distribute products made by others. Classify their main business activity.
answer_options: Food and or beverage distributor and manufacturer
Not a food or beverage distributor or manufacturer

questions.question: Is there any indication of this business's annual revenue or order quantity? Return a rough range. We're looking at ANNUAL revenue here in GBP (£).
